subject: Re: Confidential
body_html:
I thought it stood that they were preparing a sale document ,, is that not true.I'll call jp

----- Original Message ----
From: Matthieu DE BOISSESON <MDEBOISSESON@DARROISVILLEY.COM>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: Matthieu DE BOISSESON <MDEBOISSESON@DARROISVILLEY.COM>
Sent: Thursday, February 1, 2007 3:50:09 AM
Subject: Confidential

Dear Jeffrey,

 

I received a call from the sellers' lawyer saying that they have other potential purchasers and that they want an offer from JPM by tomorrow.

 

If you still wish to buy, I suggest to confirm the 10.5 million offer or to take the risk to make a lower offer (with the reservations I expressed in my previous e mail).

 

Kind regards,

 

Matthieu de BOISSÉSON
